basic_details.job_title: Karnataka Panchayat Raj Commissionerate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Subject Expert and Young Professionals Posts
basic_details.short_information: Karnataka Panchayat Raj Commissionerate Subject Expert and Young Professionals Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of the Karnataka Panchayat Raj Commissionerate. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Karnataka Panchayat Raj Commissionerate Subject Expert and Young Professionals Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate or Graduate in Sociology/Social Work/Rural Development/Public Policy or any other subject, Must know Kannada (read, write, speak), English and Computer skills (MS-Word, MS-Excel, MS-PowerPoint)
qualification.details: Subject Expert: Post Graduate in Sociology/Social Work/Rural Development/Public Policy or any other subject with a minimum of 5-8 years of field-level experience in the social development sector. Preference will be given to candidates with knowledge and experience in the Panchayat Raj system, community participation, and project preparation. Young Professional: Graduate in Sociology/Social Work/Rural Development/Public Policy or any other subject with a minimum of 2 years of experience in health, rural development, women, children, persons with disabilities, or senior citizens-related fields. Must know Kannada (read, write, speak), English, and possess computer skills (MS-Word, MS-Excel, MS-PowerPoint).

salary_details.details: Subject Expert: Rs. 100000 Per Month Young Professional: Rs. 75000 Per Month

selection_process: experience and skills Computer Literacy Test Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Karnataka Panchayat Raj Commissionerate Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Karnataka Panchayat Raj Commissionerate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Karnataka Panchayat Raj Commissionerate recruitment is 06 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Subject Expert post?
faq.answer: For the Subject Expert post, candidates need to be Post Graduates in Sociology/Social Work/Rural Development/Public Policy or a related subject, with 5-8 years of field experience in the social development sector. Knowledge of the Panchayat Raj system is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for both Subject Expert and Young Professional posts is between 30 to 35 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Young Professional post is Rs. 75,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Karnataka Panchayat Raj Commissionerate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a merit-based assessment of qualification and experience, followed by a Computer Literacy Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What computer skills are required for the candidates?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess computer skills, including proficiency in MS-Word, MS-Excel, and MS-PowerPoint. Knowledge of Kannada and English is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by the Karnataka Panchayat Raj Commissionerate for the posts of Subject Expert and Young Professionals.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the educational qualification for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: For the Young Professional post, candidates must be Graduates in Sociology/Social Work/Rural Development/Public Policy or any other relevant subject, with at least 2 years of experience in related fields.
